root_cause.text: The XML parser configurations in the XStream StAX drivers previously allowed the resolution of external entities by default, exposing the application to XML External Entity (XXE) attacks when processing untrusted XML data.
root_cause.evidence: The patch explicitly disables external entity support across multiple drivers by adding `instance.setProperty(XMLInputFactory.IS_SUPPORTING_EXTERNAL_ENTITIES, false);` to the newly instantiated `XMLInputFactory` objects.

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: The XML parser configurations in the XStream StAX drivers previously allowed the resolution of external entities by default, exposing the application to XML External Entity (XXE) attacks when processing untrusted XML data.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The patch explicitly disables external entity support across multiple drivers by adding `instance.setProperty(XMLInputFactory.IS_SUPPORTING_EXTERNAL_ENTITIES, false);` to the newly instantiated `XMLInputFactory` objects.

intent_record.intent_summary: Update the copyright header to include the year 2015.
intent_record.what: Added the year 2015 to the copyright notice in the file header comment.
intent_record.how: This change has no functional impact on program execution as it only modifies a comment.

intent_record.intent_summary: Disable external entity resolution in XMLInputFactory to prevent XXE vulnerabilities.
intent_record.what: Modified the creation of XMLInputFactory to set the IS_SUPPORTING_EXTERNAL_ENTITIES property to false before returning the instance.
intent_record.how: Prevents the XML parser from resolving external entities during parsing, which protects against XML External Entity (XXE) attacks.

intent_record.intent_summary: Update copyright year to 2015 and clean up whitespace in the license header.
intent_record.what: Updated the copyright header to include the year 2015 and removed trailing whitespace.
intent_record.how: This change only modifies code comments and formatting, having no effect on runtime behavior.

intent_record.intent_summary: Remove trailing whitespace in Javadoc comment.
intent_record.what: Removed trailing whitespace in a Javadoc comment.
intent_record.how: This change has no impact on runtime behavior, affecting only source code formatting.

intent_record.intent_summary: Disable external entity resolution in XMLInputFactory to prevent XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerabilities.
intent_record.what: The instantiation of XMLInputFactory was modified to assign the instance to a local variable and set a property before returning it.
intent_record.how: It explicitly disables the IS_SUPPORTING_EXTERNAL_ENTITIES property, preventing the XML parser from resolving external entities.

intent_record.what: The copyright year for XStream Committers was updated to include 2015.
intent_record.how: This change has no effect on the program's execution or functionality.

intent_record.intent_summary: Disable external entity resolution in the XMLInputFactory to prevent XXE vulnerabilities.
intent_record.what: Modified createInputFactory to set the IS_SUPPORTING_EXTERNAL_ENTITIES property to false on the XMLInputFactory instance before returning it.
intent_record.how: Prevents the XML parser from resolving external entities during parsing, thereby mitigating XML External Entity (XXE) injection risks.

intent_record.intent_summary: Update copyright year in file header.
intent_record.what: Added the year 2015 to the copyright header comment.
intent_record.how: This change has no effect on the runtime behavior of the code.

intent_record.intent_summary: Disable external entity processing in the XML input factory to mitigate XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerabilities.
intent_record.what: Modified createInputFactory to explicitly set the IS_SUPPORTING_EXTERNAL_ENTITIES property to false on the WstxInputFactory instance.
intent_record.how: Disables the resolution of external entities during XML parsing, which prevents the parser from accessing external resources.

bic_trace_step.commit_msg: The XppDriver uses now the official XmlPullParser API to locate an available parser using the XmlPullParserFactory. This
bic_trace_step.code_snippet:
commit 4fd39f2f2616d4ea9e1d25d30dc78931be01dfb0
Author: Jörg Schaible <joerg.schaible@gmx.de>
Date:   Wed Apr 29 23:55:49 2009 +0000

    The XppDriver uses now the official XmlPullParser API to locate an available parser using the XmlPullParserFactory. This allows the usage of XPP technology with XStream in Android (XSTR-542).
    Additional explicit XPP drivers for the Xpp3 and kXML2 implementations.
    Additional explicit StAX drivers for Woodstox, BEA StAX and SJSXP of the JDK 6 implementat
bic_trace_step.reason: The createInputFactory() method instantiates 'com.sun.xml.internal.stream.XMLInputFactoryImpl' but does not disable external entity resolution (e.g., via XMLInputFactory.IS_SUPPORTING_EXTERNAL_ENTITIES). This leaves the driver vulnerable to XXE attacks.

bic_trace_step.code_snippet:
commit 72efd4a37f0ab81d2dfeb013d35ec7cbed0510b1
Author: Jörg Schaible <joerg.schaible@gmx.de>
Date:   Wed Mar 12 22:49:01 2014 +0000

    git-svn-id: http://svn.codehaus.org/xstream/trunk@2272 9830eeb5-ddf4-0310-9ef7-f4b9a3e3227e

diff --git a/xstream/src/java/com/thoughtworks/xstream/io/xml/StandardStaxDriver.java b/xstream/src/java/com/thoughtworks/xstream/io/xml/StandardStaxDriver.java
index 1fe744dd..d4b1749f 100644
--- a/xstream/src/java/com/thoughtworks/xstream/io/xml/StandardStaxDriver.ja
bic_trace_step.reason: The snippet shows the `createInputFactory` method which creates a new XMLInputFactory instance. The vulnerability root cause states that the StAX driver allows the resolution of external entities by default. The provided code instantiates the input factory but does not configure it to disable external entities (e.g., `factory.setProperty(XMLInputFactory.IS_SUPPORTING_EXTERNAL_ENTITIES, false)`), thus containing the vulnerable construct.

bic_trace_step.reason: The commit introduces `WstxDriver` which creates an `MXParserFactory` in `createInputFactory()`.
